div.h3: Ring 3 → Ring 0 → Inode → cdev lookup → file_operations → Driver

ul.li: struct inode: The file on disk (i_rdev major/minor)
struct file: The open instance (f_op, f_pos)
struct cdev: The device registration object

div.p:
Post-Open State:
Subsequent read(3, ...) or write(3, ...) calls will skip the major/minor lookup and jump directly to filp->f_op->read() or filp->f_op->write().
